weeks.label: Week 10A (Bodybuilding Testing)
weeks.notes: Run Week 10A if you have mostly bodybuilding and strength goals. Always use a good spotter. Do not test maxes if you are feeling pain or not properly recovered.

exercises.notes: Aim for 1-5 rep PR. Use a spotter and safety bars. Work up with 1 set at 50%, 70%, 80%, 90%, then test
Position both hands in no lat pulldown, outer elbow and arm direction
Focus on the mind-muscle connection
1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top
As many reps as possible, always use a spotter and good form, aim for 1-5 reps
Do lying leg curl machine on muscle, ham curl if no machine access
Can do with cables or bands, squeeze triceps to move the weight
As many reps as possible, always use good form, aim for 1-5 reps
Reset each rep, don't touch and press
Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads
Focus on squeezing, your back as you extend slowly

weeks.label: Week 10B (Powerlifting Testing)
weeks.notes: Run Week 10B only if you have competitive powerlifting goals. Important: carefully choose which week to run. Do not run both weeks.

exercises.notes: Aim for a 1 rep PR. Use a spotter and safety bars. Work up to your max attempt slowly
Position both hands, outer elbow direction
1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top
Aim for a 1 rep PR. Start with approx 60% and increase 5-10%. Mind the technique and leg drive
Do lying leg curl machine on muscle, ham curl if no machine access
Can do with cables or bands, squeeze triceps to move the weight
Aim for a 1 rep PR. Start with approx 60% and go up 5-10%. Mind the technique, pull with a sense of urgency. A miss is still progress
Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads
Focus on squeezing, your back as you extend slowly

weeks.label: Week 11 (Deload)
weeks.notes: Deload week. Avoid failure and train lighter this week before running back through week 1 or a new program.

weeks.label: Optional Arm & Hypertrophy Pump Day
weeks.notes: Add this arm and hypertrophy day optionally. Run this day on the 5th training day if you have an extra day to train. Schedule it on weeks 1, 3, 5, 7, and 9.
